message:
test(python): re-add matrix_transpose oracle test (franken_numpy-ozw7)

The 7-scenario oracle test for matrix_transpose was lost from the
prior commit due to a stash race; this restores it covering 2-D,
3-D batched (with shape verification), 4-D batched, float dtype
parity, complex transpose-without-conjugation, and 1-D error parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
